Theorem op2ndd 7981
Description: Extract the second member of an ordered pair. (Contributed by Mario Carneiro, 31-Aug-2015.)
Hypotheses
Ref Expression
op1st.1 ⊢ 𝐴 ∈ V
op1st.2 ⊢ 𝐵 ∈ V
Assertion
Ref Expression
op2ndd ⊢ (𝐶 = ⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩ → (2nd ‘𝐶) = 𝐵)
Proof of Theorem op2ndd
StepHypRef Expression
1 fveq2 6867 . 2 ⊢ (𝐶 = ⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩ → (2nd ‘𝐶) = (2nd ‘⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩))
2 op1st.1 . . 3 ⊢ 𝐴 ∈ V
3 op1st.2 . . 3 ⊢ 𝐵 ∈ V
42, 3op2nd 7979 . 2 ⊢ (2nd ‘⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩) = 𝐵
51, 4eqtrdi 2813 1 ⊢ (𝐶 = ⟨𝐴, 𝐵⟩ → (2nd ‘𝐶) = 𝐵)
Colors of variables: wff setvar class
Syntax hints:   → wi 4   = wceq 1560   ∈ wcel 2142  Vcvv 3454  ⟨cop 4588  ‘cfv 6521  2nd c2nd 7969
